default.title: Free Online Document & Image Tool
default.description: Process files securely in your browser. No uploads, fast, and 100% private.
default.articleHtml:
Secure and Private Processing

Your privacy is our top priority. Unlike other services that upload your documents to external servers for processing, our tool works entirely within your browser. This means your files never leave your device.

Why Choose Our Tool?

  • 100% Free: No hidden costs or subscriptions required.
  • Lightning Fast: Utilizing your device's processing power ensures instant results without upload or download wait times.
  • Complete Privacy: Your sensitive data remains completely private.

Start streamlining your workflow today with our secure browser-based utility.

hindi-official-message-formatter.title: Hindi Official Message Formatter - Free Draft Generator
hindi-official-message-formatter.description: Generate perfectly formatted formal Hindi messages for office notices, leave applications, and urgent orders instantly.
hindi-official-message-formatter.articleHtml:
How to Write Official Hindi Messages (कार्यालयीन हिंदी)

Drafting official communications in Hindi can be time-consuming, especially when ensuring the correct formal tone and structure. Our Hindi Official Message Formatter automates this process.

Available Formats

  • Formal Application (औपचारिक पत्र): Perfect for general applications, requests, and official correspondence.
  • Urgent Notice (अति आवश्यक सूचना): Used for immediate attention matters in a corporate or government setting.
  • Office Order (कार्यालय आदेश): Standard format for internal office memos and directives.
  • Leave Application (अवकाश हेतु आवेदन): Professionally structure your sick leave, casual leave, or vacation requests.

Benefits of Using Our Formatter

By standardizing your Hindi drafts, you ensure professionalism in all your communications. The tool automatically adds the appropriate salutations (महोदय) and valedictions (भवदीय), saving you valuable time.

combined-sip-swp-calculator.title: Combined SIP & SWP Calculator | Mutual Fund Planner
combined-sip-swp-calculator.description: Plan your complete financial lifecycle. Calculate SIP returns for wealth accumulation and SWP withdrawals for retirement income.
combined-sip-swp-calculator.articleHtml:
Understanding Combined SIP and SWP Planning

A comprehensive financial plan involves two major phases: wealth accumulation and wealth distribution. Our Combined SIP & SWP Calculator helps you visualize both phases seamlessly.

Phase 1: Accumulation via SIP (Systematic Investment Plan)

SIP allows you to invest a fixed amount regularly in mutual funds. This phase harnesses the power of compounding. By entering your monthly investment, expected return rate, and tenure, you can estimate your total corpus at retirement.

Phase 2: Distribution via SWP (Systematic Withdrawal Plan)

Once you've built your corpus, an SWP allows you to withdraw a fixed amount monthly, acting as a regular pension. The remaining balance continues to earn returns.

Why Use a Combined Calculator?

Instead of calculating these phases separately, our tool lets you see if your planned SIP will generate a large enough corpus to sustain your desired monthly SWP post-retirement without depleting your capital prematurely.

gst-calculator.title: Indian GST Calculator Online - Add or Remove GST
gst-calculator.description: Easily calculate GST (Goods and Services Tax) for Indian businesses. Quickly add or remove 5%, 12%, 18%, or 28% GST.
gst-calculator.articleHtml:
Complete Guide to the Indian GST Calculator

The Goods and Services Tax (GST) is a unified indirect tax across India. Calculating the exact CGST and SGST/IGST components manually can lead to invoicing errors. Our free online GST Calculator ensures accuracy.

How to Calculate GST

You can use this tool in two ways:

  • Add GST: Enter the base price of the item and select the GST slab. The calculator will output the total price including tax and the exact tax amount.
  • Remove GST: If you have the final MRP and need to find the base price, select 'Remove GST'. This is crucial for reverse-calculating invoice values.

Current GST Slabs in India

The primary GST rates are 5%, 12%, 18%, and 28%. Essential items are generally taxed lower, while luxury goods fall into the 28% bracket.

land-converter.title: Indian Land Area Converter - Bigha, Kattha, Acre
land-converter.description: Convert local Indian land measurement units like Bigha, Kattha, Biswa to standard units like Acres, Hectares, and Square Feet based on state rules.
land-converter.articleHtml:
Navigating Indian Land Measurement Units

Land measurement in India is highly localized. A 'Bigha' in Punjab is completely different from a 'Bigha' in Bihar or Rajasthan. Our Indian Land Converter takes state-specific variations into account.

Common Regional Units

  • Bigha & Kattha: Widely used in North and East India (UP, Bihar, West Bengal). The exact square footage varies drastically by state.
  • Biswa & Biswansi: Sub-units of Bigha used primarily in UP, Punjab, and Haryana.
  • Guntha: Common in Maharashtra, Gujarat, and Karnataka.
  • Cent: Frequently used in Southern states like Tamil Nadu and Kerala.

Why State-Specific Conversion is Crucial

Using a generic converter for Indian land can result in massive legal and financial discrepancies during real estate transactions. Always ensure you are using conversions specific to the state where the property is located.

signature-resize.title: Online Signature Resizer - Crop and Format for Forms
signature-resize.description: Resize, crop, and format your digital signature to meet exact KB and pixel requirements for online applications and government forms.
signature-resize.articleHtml:
Perfecting Your Digital Signature for Online Forms

Uploading a signature to online government portals, job applications, or university forms often comes with strict dimensional and file size requirements (e.g., "Must be exactly 140x60 pixels and under 20KB"). Our Signature Resizer solves this problem instantly.

Common Signature Requirements

Most portals require signatures to be in JPG or JPEG format, with a file size typically restricted between 10KB and 50KB. Dimensions often hover around a 2:1 or 3:1 width-to-height ratio.

How to Use the Tool

Upload a photo of your signature (ideally drawn with a black pen on plain white paper). Use our cropping tool to remove excess white space, set your target dimensions and maximum file size, and download the perfectly formatted image. Your signature is processed locally on your device for complete security.

salary-calculator.title: Salary Calculator - Take Home Pay & Tax Estimator
salary-calculator.description: Calculate your net take-home salary after deductions like PF, Professional Tax, and Income Tax. Plan your finances better.
salary-calculator.articleHtml:
Calculate Your Actual Take-Home Salary

Understanding the difference between your CTC (Cost to Company) and your actual take-home (net) salary is crucial for financial planning. Our Salary Calculator helps demystify your paycheck.

Common Salary Deductions

  • Provident Fund (PF): A mandatory retirement savings contribution, usually 12% of your basic salary.
  • Professional Tax (PT): A state-level tax levied in certain states, maxing out at ₹2,500 per year.
  • Income Tax (TDS): Tax Deducted at Source based on your income slab and declared investments.

CTC vs. Gross vs. Net Salary

Your CTC includes benefits like employer PF contributions and gratuity, which you don't receive monthly. Your Gross Salary is what is paid before taxes and employee deductions. Your Net Salary is the final amount deposited into your bank account.

robots-txt-generator.title: Robots.txt & Robots Meta Tag Generator - SEO Control Tool
robots-txt-generator.description: Generate custom robots.txt rules, configure robots meta tags (noindex, nosnippet), test paths, and simulate Google Search appearance.
robots-txt-generator.articleHtml:
Mastering Search Engine Crawling & Indexing

Controlling how search engines like Google and Bing crawl and index your website is fundamental to SEO. Our free online Robots.txt & Robots Meta Tag Builder gives you complete control over search results appearance.

What is a Robots.txt File?

The robots.txt file is a plain text file placed in your website's root directory. It instructs search engine spiders (user-agents) which pages or sections of your site they should or shouldn't crawl. For example, blocking /admin/ or /temp/ folders saves crawl budget and secures sensitive locations.

Understanding Robots Meta Tags

While robots.txt controls crawling, robots meta tags control indexing. They are placed in the <head> of specific web pages:

  • noindex: Tells search engines not to show this page in search results at all.
  • nofollow: Tells search engines not to follow any links on this page.
  • nosnippet: Tells search engines to index the page but prevent showing a description snippet, video preview, or rich results in the search results (displaying 'No page information is available' instead).

The Interaction Between Robots.txt and Meta Tags

A common SEO mistake is blocking a page in robots.txt while also adding a noindex tag to it. If a page is blocked by robots.txt, Google cannot crawl it to see the noindex instruction, which means the page might still appear in search results with a missing snippet. Use our generator to create accurate SEO directives.
